series_metadata.series_description: Surety files of well owners who no longer own wells - bonds, financial statements, insurance certificates, change of owner forms, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two years cancellation of well owner registration. Microfilm or scan an electronic format ; Microform: life of wells ; Electronic: life of wells
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
